name: KEMPER Corp
summary: PART I . Kemper is an insurance holding company that offers complementary insurance products, through its subsidiaries, including personal and commercial automobile insurance to consumers in targeted markets and industries. Kemper also offers life and other insurance solutions to customers who desire basic protection for themselves and their families.
